home.title: The Future of Certificate Verification
home.description: Secure, transparent, and tamper-proof certificate verification powered by blockchain technology. Instantly validate authenticity and eliminate fraud in the digital era.

validate.title: Validate Certificates
validate.description: Enter a certificate ID to verify its authenticity on the blockchain. Our system will check the certificate against the official registry.
validate.validMessage: This certificate has been verified and is authentic.
validate.invalidMessage: This certificate could not be found in our registry.
validate.name: Recipient Name

manual.title: Manual Search
manual.description: Enter your certificate ID or hash to verify its authenticity

pdf.title: PDF File Validation
pdf.description: Drag the original PDF Here to validate

qr.title: QR Code Validation
qr.description: To verify issued certificates, simply point your smart phone camera at the QR code. The system will automatically recognize the validation URL and display an authenticity report in your mobile browser, ensuring the credentials are genuine and registered on the blockchain.

footer.description: The future of certificate verification. Secure, transparent, and tamper-proof verification powered by blockchain technology.

newsletter.description: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest updates and features.
